flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Ithaca College rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 ($26.8k → $32.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Ithaca College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($46.8k → $53.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Ithaca College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8k → 4.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ithaca College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
